## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check . && ruff format --check .` passes
- [ ] `mypy src/` passes
- [ ] `pytest tests/unit tests/integration` passes (coverage gate enforced)
- [ ] New behavior has tests
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]` (user-visible changes)
